revision.comment: Undid revision 1185249438 by [[Special:Contributions/Hollymceathron|Hollymceathron]] ([[User talk:Hollymceathron|talk]])
1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
trying to fix errors
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qqq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:New]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (6 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (5 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Monthly clean-up category (Wikipedia articles needing copy edit) counter]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 5 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{polluted category}}
{{Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles Needing Copy Edit/Effort}}
{{WP:WikiProject Guild of Copy Editors/Ombox}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes|shortcut1=CAT:COPYEDIT|shortcut2=CAT:ALLCE}}
{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Backlog How To|These articles should be  to clean up their prose. Because of the size of this category, users may prefer to work with [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing copy edit]], which subdivides copy edit requests based on when they were requested.}}
{{tl|Copy edit}}
{{Random page in category}}
{{filter category by topic}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:All articles needing copy edit]]
[[en:Category:All articles needing copy edit]]
[[WP:Basic copyediting|copy edited]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Wikipedia articles needing copy edit| *]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] (crud category cleanup) [https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22480594122 commit triggered pipeline]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_needing_copy_edit here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
